questions.prompt: Which of the following lines has a slope of -2?

A student states that the system of equations y = 2x + 1 and y = 2x - 3 has exactly one solution because they have the same slope. Critique the student's statement and explain the actual number of solutions to this system.
questions.rubric_guide: Max 10 pts. 5 pts for identifying the student's error (same slope means parallel, not intersecting). 5 pts for clearly stating that there are 0 solutions in parallel systems.
